input.alertTitle: github-notifications delivery delay over SLO
input.logSnippet: notification worker queue delay over 10 minutes worker pools close to capacity backlog increasing
input.symptomDescription: 邮件和 Web 通知投递延迟，约 10% 通知超过 10 分钟

input.alertTitle: github-migration-tools 100% migration outage
input.logSnippet: migration jobs failed missing Docker images after component deployment rollback required
input.symptomDescription: 迁移工具窗口内所有用户迁移失败

input.alertTitle: github-actions run start delays and job failures
input.logSnippet: run start delayed 14 minutes average job failure rate 21 percent throttling in critical path
input.symptomDescription: Actions run start 延迟，部分 job 失败，Pages branch builds failed

input.alertTitle: github-codespaces create and start failures
input.logSnippet: 75 percent create start failures after manual configuration changes to internal dependency
input.symptomDescription: Codespaces 创建和启动失败，回滚配置后恢复

input.alertTitle: github-services degradation due to database host contention
input.logSnippet: multiple services degraded resource contention on database hosts elevated latency and errors
input.symptomDescription: 多个 GitHub 服务因数据库主机资源争用发生退化

input.alertTitle: github-issues attachment uploads failing with CORS errors
input.logSnippet: attachment upload failed CORS error custom header added to client HTTP requests feature flag rollback
input.symptomDescription: Issues 附件上传失败，特性开关回滚后恢复

input.alertTitle: github pull request ORM dropped column elevated error rates
input.logSnippet: production database migration dropped column ORM continued to reference removed column elevated web REST API errors
input.symptomDescription: push、webhook、notification、pull request 相关请求错误率升高

input.alertTitle: github-copilot 403 errors from global rate limiter
input.logSnippet: feature flag partial deployment global rate limiter invalid state 100 percent requests returned 403 errors
input.symptomDescription: Copilot 多数功能不可用，回滚 feature flag 后恢复

input.alertTitle: github-dependabot jobs hitting GHCR rate limit
input.logSnippet: Dependabot unable to complete 57 percent jobs within SLO hitting GitHub Container Registry rate limit
input.symptomDescription: Dependabot job 因 GHCR 限流无法按 SLO 完成

input.alertTitle: github-git all git operations failing
input.logSnippet: all Git operations failed SSH HTTP raw file access unavailable elevated errors
input.symptomDescription: SSH、HTTP Git client 交互和 raw file 访问失败

input.alertTitle: github-copilot-review request timeouts and queue growth
input.logSnippet: model backed dependency elevated response times request timeouts backpressure sustained queue growth failed reviews
input.symptomDescription: Copilot Code Review 部分 PR review 请求失败，需要用户重新请求

input.alertTitle: github-copilot-policies update failures after database migration
input.logSnippet: policy updates failed database migration caused schema drift synchronize schema required
input.symptomDescription: 用户、组织、企业无法更新 Copilot policies

input.alertTitle: github.com unauthenticated requests slow and timed out
input.logSnippet: severe spike in traffic primarily search endpoints slow page loads API request timeouts automated traffic management
input.symptomDescription: 未登录请求页面加载慢或超时，主要来自搜索端点流量暴涨

name: google-pubsub-permission-denied-config
sourceName: Google Cloud Service Health: Cloud Pub/Sub April 2024

input.alertTitle: google-pubsub permission denied errors for publish and subscribe
input.logSnippet: PERMISSION_DENIED publish subscribe all API methods bad configuration change rolled back
input.symptomDescription: 多个区域 Cloud Pub/Sub publish/subscribe/control operations 返回 permission denied

name: google-firestore-firebase-rules-permission-denied
sourceName: Google Cloud Service Health: Cloud Firestore November 2023

input.alertTitle: google-firestore permission denied reading and writing database
input.logSnippet: Firebase Security Rules permission denied JWT credentials newer keys could not be verified timestamp mismatch configuration rollout
input.symptomDescription: Firestore/Firebase Auth/GCIP 在 nam5 多区域出现错误的 permission denied

input.alertTitle: aws-lambda invocation increased error rates and latencies
input.logSnippet: Lambda function invocations increased error rates latency frontend fleet scaling latent software defect capacity threshold
input.symptomDescription: US-EAST-1 Lambda invocation 错误率和延迟升高，影响多个 AWS 服务

input.alertTitle: aws-sts elevated error rates for SAML federation

input.alertTitle: aws-eventbridge delivery latency up to 801 seconds

input.symptomDescription: EventBridge 事件投递延迟显著升高

input.alertTitle: aws-console unavailable and 504 timeout errors

input.symptomDescription: 访问 AWS Management Console 看到 unavailable 或 504 Time-out

input.alertTitle: aws-apigateway increased errors during internal network impairment

input.alertTitle: aws-fargate insufficient capacity errors after control plane recovery

input.alertTitle: cloudflare-access widespread authentication failures

input.alertTitle: cloudflare-waf-proxy HTTP 500 errors after global config change

input.logSnippet: Turnstile failed to load dashboard login blocked due to Turnstile unavailable core proxy outage
